title: Cherry Grove Villages
description: A completely new vanilla like village in minecraft Cherry Grove biome!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Cexn6Mf.png)
#  **Cherry Grove Villages - _1.21_**  🎴
## _Do you find the new Cherry Grove biome a little bit empty? Well, not anymore!_


###  ▶️ ABOUT
A completely new vanilla like custom village that generates in Cherry Grove biomes. They were intended for my SMP but I thought that it would be cool to make it public. 
### ▶️ HOW TO FIND A VILLAGE
The villages only generate in cherry grove biomes, they're a bit rare so keep that in mind. Also you can use **/locate structure nova_cherry_village:village_cherry**
### ▶️ HELP
If you find a bug or if you need support please let me know [here](https://discord.gg/K7jCKM9Z9c)
### ▶️ ADDITIONAL INFO
Shaders used in screenshots from gallery: 
> [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

Resource pack used in screenshots from gallery: 
> [Bare Bones 1.20](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)

_Cherry Grove is not the best biome to fit a village so I had to make them quite rare to reduce bad generation probability, be aware!_

_You are free to use this project as you wish, will appreciate if you give credits ❤_
